content: The multi-perspective inconsistency detection core of LLM self-reflection mechanisms can be embedded into the step-by-step iterative self-feedback loop of Self-Refine to create a fully unsupervised self-improvement framework that fixes the blind spot of single-perspective self-feedback in original Self-Refine. Original Self-Refine only leverages the LLM's single fixed perspective to criticize its own output, so integrating inconsistent solving perspectives from self-reflection mechanisms lets the model catch more flaws that would be invisible to a single self-feedback pass.
